title: Vampire Mistress damages one creature and heals one creature

card.rawText: Inflict 10 damage to a creature and heal a creature 10 HP.

plan.title: Vampire Mistress damages one creature and heals one creature
plan.summary: Play Vampire Mistress, choose the opponent's primary creature for the 10 damage prompt and your damaged primary creature for the 10 HP heal prompt.

notes: Place test_creature_hp100 on player_1 field as primary.
Set current HP to 80 before play.
Choose player_2 primary for damage and player_1 primary for healing.

steps: Resolve the damage target prompt against player_2 primary.
Resolve the healing target prompt against player_1 primary.
Inspect both primary creatures' current HP.
manualVerification: Confirm both prompts allow any creature unless another card-specific restriction is introduced.
riskNotes: This covers the deterministic friendly-heal and opponent-damage routing for the combined card text.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate the damage half and combined prompt routing.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
